arts.ttl: Roy Keane ‘embarrassed’ as Kyle Walker sparks controversy in Manchester derby
arts.sum: The Manchester City captain was booked along with Rasmus Hojlund after a head-to-head collision in the derby

arts.ttl: Roy Keane Slams Kyle Walker For Actions During Manchester City vs Manchester United
arts.sum: The former Manchester United midfielder slammed Kyle Walker for going down softly after his clash with Rasmus Hojlund.

arts.ttl: 'Embarrassed' - Man United handed Rasmus Hojlund red card verdict vs Man City amid Kyle Walker clash
arts.sum: Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund was involved in a coming together with Manchester City's Kyle Walker as the derby heated up

arts.ttl: 'Embarrassing' - Roy Keane slams Kyle Walker after Rasmus Hojlund incident in Manchester derby
arts.sum: Man City defender Kyle Walker went down after a head to head with Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund

arts.ttl: Roy Keane rips into ailing Manchester United stars and accuses them of lacking bravery as Ruben Amorim's side concede from ANOTHER set-piece
arts.sum: Former Man United captain Roy Keane was irked at United conceding from another set piece, with Josko Gvardiol's header making it eight goals conceded from a corner this season.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Man Utd chaos as all 22 players clash after Kyle Walker 'embarrassment'
arts.sum: Manchester United and Manchester City players brawled after a clash between Rasmus Hojlund and Kyle Walker, who angrily squared up to each other on the pitch at the Etihad

arts.ttl: Why aren’t Rashford or Garnacho playing for Man United against Man City in the Premier League?
arts.sum: It’s simply an evaluation, and they know it,“ the Portuguese coach told Sky. There were two surprising omissions from the team sheet for this evening’s Manchester derby at the Etihad - neither Alejandro Garnacho nor Marcus Rashford featured in Manchester United’s starting XI against City, and stranger still, nor were they on the bench.

arts.ttl: Everton claim shock win against title hopefuls Manchester City
arts.sum: Lucy Hope and Honoka Hayashi put the Toffees firmly in control with first-half goals.

arts.ttl: What happened after Mason Mount suffered latest Man United blow spoke volumes
arts.sum: Manchester United midfielder Mason Mount had his afternoon against Manchester City cut short as he is plagued with another injury

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim handed injury blow as Manchester United star limps off early vs Man City
arts.sum: Mason Mount had to replaced after 14 minutes of Man United's clash with Manchester City after picking up an injury.
